projects.title: Road Sawing Works in Five Dock
projects.summary: Controlled road sawing for a civil works program with clean cuts and fast site handover.
projects.description: ALL CORE completed precision road sawing to support a programmed civil works scope in Five Dock. The work focused on clean line cutting, controlled equipment operation and keeping the site ready for the next stage of construction.
projects.altText: Road sawing project completed by ALL CORE

projects.title: After-Hours Core Drilling
projects.summary: Night works core drilling completed for service penetrations with minimal disruption.
projects.description: This after-hours project required accurate core drilling for service access while reducing disruption to surrounding works. ALL CORE supplied the equipment and crew needed to complete the penetrations safely and efficiently.
projects.altText: Core drilling equipment operating at night

projects.title: Wall Opening and Structural Modification
projects.summary: Clean wall sawing and penetration work for a building modification project.
projects.description: ALL CORE supported a building modification scope with controlled wall sawing and penetration work. The project required accurate cutting, careful site coordination and a clean handover for follow-on trades.
projects.altText: Wall penetration work completed by ALL CORE
